warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket within the period of Monday, 29 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket dalam tempoh Isnin, 29 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Pahang, Terengganu and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 1:00AM; Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Pahang, Terengganu dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 1:00 pagi; Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, western part of Samui, southeastern part of Bunguran, eastern part of Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan and Palawan until 1:00AM; Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, barat Samui, tenggara Bunguran, timur Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan dan Palawan sehingga 1:00 pagi; Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang within the period of Tuesday, 30 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang dalam tempoh Selasa, 30 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Baling, Kulim and Bandar Baharu);  Penang  (Central Seberang Perai and South Seberang Perai);  Perak  (Larut, Matang and Selama and Hulu Perak);  Kelantan  (Pasir Mas, Jeli and Tanah Merah); and  Sabah:  Interior (Tenom, Kuala Penyu, Beaufort, Keningau and Tambunan), West Coast, Sandakan (Tongod) and Kudat (Kota Marudu) until 2:00AM; Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Baling, Kulim dan Bandar Baharu);  Pulau Pinang  (Seberang Perai Tengah dan Seberang Perai Selatan);  Perak  (Larut, Matang Dan Selama dan Hulu Perak);  Kelantan  (Pasir Mas, Jeli dan Tanah Merah); dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Tenom, Kuala Penyu, Beaufort, Keningau dan Tambunan), Pantai Barat, Sandakan (Tongod) dan Kudat (Kota Marudu) sehingga 2:00 pagi; Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
